heading: What's New in 6.21
body:
The Node.js driver v6.21 release includes the following features:

- Deprecates the following properties and interface, which will be removed in v7.0:

  - `MongoCredentials.authMechanismProperties.AWS_SESSION_TOKEN`

  - `CommandOptions.noResponse`

  - `ConnectionOptions.cancellationToken`

  - `CursorStreamOptions`

To learn more about this release, see the
[v6.21.0 Release Notes](https://github.com/mongodb/node-mongodb-native/releases/tag/v6.21.0) on
GitHub.
